english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍوَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Alláh bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

Peace upon you,
O guardian of guardians

Peace be upon the
leader of the pure

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَةَ اللهِ عَلىَ الْلَائِقِ اَجْمَعِيْنَ
english translation text:
Peace be upon you,
O Allah's argument, on all that is good

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خَلَفَ اَئِمَّةِ الدِّيْنِ
english translation text:
Peace upon you,
O successor of the religion

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا اَبَا الْحَسَنِ يَا عَلِيَّ بْنَ مُحَمَّد
english translation text:
Peace upon you
O Abul Hassan, Ali bin Mohammed

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا اَيُّهَا النَّقِيُّ الْهَادِيُ
english translation text:
Peace be on you,
O pure and quiet

Peace be upon you and God's mercy and
blessings be upon you
